headline: Charter Communications Taps Nick Jeffery To Drive Core Operating Performance
summary: Charter Communications (NasdaqGS:CHTR) has appointed Nick Jeffery as Chief Operating Officer. Jeffery steps into a broad operational role covering Marketing, Sales, Field Operations, and Customer Operations. He previously led operational and cultural changes at Frontier Communications and Vodafone UK. For a company of Charter's size in U.S. broadband and pay TV, execution across marketing, sales, and field operations can heavily influence subscriber trends and service quality. The...
